vllm.title: [Kernel] Flashinfer correctness fix for v0.1.3
vllm.author: LiuXiaoxuanPKU
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Reported by @felixzhu555 , is_profile_run is buggy in flashinfer backend, which will fail flashinfer v0.1.3. This PR fixes this, and update CI flashinfer version to v1.0.3.

vllm.title: [Core][VLM] Support image embeddings as input
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the support for passing image embeddings as input so that they can be directly consumed by the language model.
Example usage
# Refer to the HuggingFace repo for the correct format to use
prompt = "USER: <image>\nWhat is the content of this image?\nASSISTANT:"

# Image embedding generate

vllm.title: [Frontend] Disallow passing `model` as both argument and option
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, it's possible to run vllm serve <model_tag> --model <model>, in which case model is ignored. To avoid this confusing behavior, this PR prohibits using the --model option in vllm serve.
FIX #7345

vllm.title: [CI/Build] bump Dockerfile.neuron image base, use public ECR
vllm.author: dtrifiro
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The current Neuron base image fails to build in CI due to a malformed requirements string.
It also seems that the current image is not public. I switched over to the image provided in https://github.com/aws-neuron/deep-learning-containers?tab=readme-ov-file#pytorch-inference-neuronx

vllm.title: [Misc] Use scalar type to dispatch to different `gptq_marlin` kernels
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Use ScalarType instead of num_bits (in combination with has_zp) to preform the dispatching for gptq_marlin this sets the stage for folding fp8_marlin.cu into gptq_marlin.cu since now we can move dequant_8bit in  fp8_marlin.cu as a dequant<T, vllm::kFE4M3fn.id()>(int q)  specialization. I did not fol

vllm.title: [Core] Consolidate `GB` constant and enable float GB arguments
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR factors out the repeated definition of GB into vllm.utils. It also enables swap_space and cpu_offload_gb to be set to non-integral values (not sure why they were limited to int values in the first place).

vllm.title: [Core/Bugfix] Add FP8 K/V Scale and dtype conversion for prefix/prefill Triton Kernel
vllm.author: jon-chuang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix the FP8 Triton kernel issue. Should enable FP8 KV Cache to be used with:

chunked prefill
prefix caching

FIX #4381 #3880 #3156 #3880
TODO:

 Undo guards: #3903
 Regression test: #4381 (comment)

Notes:

@comaniac mentions upcoming flashinfer support, but I think supporting it in Triton as fallb

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Handle PackageNotFoundError when checking for xpu version
vllm.author: sasha0552
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When vLLM is installed as another package (not vllm, but vllm-pascal in my case), this check causes the whole process to crash. This PR fixes this behavior.

Exception
Process Process-1:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/lib/python3.11/importlib/metadata/__init__.py", line 563, in from

vllm.title: [CI/Build] bump minimum cmake version
vllm.author: dtrifiro
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
find_python_from_executable uses find_package(PYTHON ... Development.SABIModule), which is only available since cmake>=3.26
cmake and ninja are build-time requirements, so they should not be  in requirements-common.txt or requirements-openvino.txt

vllm.title: [Core] Shut down aDAG workers with clean async llm engine exit
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Shut down ray_gpu_executor aDAG workers with clean async llm engine exit.
Changes:

Remove self references from llm engine so that destructors can be called. Borrowed code from #7041
Clean up aDAG workers with shutdown interface
Revive PP tests for aDAG, but reduced number of tests to reduce CI over

vllm.title: [mypy] Misc. typing improvements
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: A subset of #7248 to narrow down the cause of the error in basic-correctness-test.

vllm.title: [Misc] improve logits processors logging message
vllm.author: aw632
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Just a small improvement to the logits processors logging message so that the offending token_id is included in the error message.
Also removes an extraneous commented-out-line in test_serving_chat.py.

vllm.title: [ci] Remove fast check cancel workflow
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Github secret can't be passed to pull requests from fork, so we should disable it until we figure out another solution

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix weight loading for Chameleon when TP>1
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the inability to run Chameleon (7B and 30B) with tensor parallelism.

Fixed TP weight loading for layer normalization in Chameleon model.

Added row_parallel_weight_loader (extracted from our code for Command-R model) to weight utils.


Handle the case where output logits can be None w
